@zenlab_japan —This is a tea ceremony, known as chadō or sadō (“way of tea”) or cha-no-yu (“hot-water tea”) in Japan. This traditional practice is rooted in the principles of Zen Buddhism and focuses on the appreciation of beauty in daily life. The ceremony takes place in a tea house (cha-shitsu), which is a small structure that is carefully constructed and decorated with rustic yet refined simplicity. The room includes an alcove for displaying a hanging scroll or flower arrangement, a small sunken fireplace, and a low doorway that symbolizes humility. The ceremony follows a set order, and it is an aesthetic way of welcoming guests. 🎥 @zenlab_japan 📍Japan 🇯🇵 #quinnzjohnston

rush hours 3 dressing room scene 😄 Chris tucker funny moments In Rush Hour 3, Carter and Lee are investigating the Triads, and their search leads them to a fancy nightclub. Carter, being his usual bold and comedic self, decides to take the lead. He wanders into the dancers' dressing room, where the women are all getting ready for their performance, some of them half-dressed. To avoid suspicion, Carter starts acting like he's part of the management or their dance crew. He hilariously introduces himself as part of the "Z-Block" and starts hyping up the dancers, throwing out random dance instructions and compliments as if he's their choreographer. His confidence and ridiculous energy make the scene unforgettable. What makes it even funnier is how Carter interacts with the dancers-they're confused but go along with his antics, and his over-the-top behavior just keeps escalating. The whole moment is classic Chris Tucker, blending charm, humor, and improvisation, making it one of the most iconic scenes in the movie #RushHour2 #ChrisTucker #ZBlock #FunnyMoments #MovieScenes #ComedyGold #IconicMovies #FYP #ForYou #ViralVideo #TrendingNow #TikTokComedy #ThrowbackMovies #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #fypp #fyp #fypage #foryoupage #foryoupageofficiall #tiktok #commedy #commedyvedio #commedytiktok

Carter, being his usual bold and comedic self, decides to take the lead. He wanders into the dancers' dressing room, where the women are all getting ready for their performance, some of them half-dressed. To avoid suspicion, Carter starts acting like he's part of the management or their dance crew. He hilariously introduces himself as part of the "Z-Block" and starts hyping up the dancers, throwing out random dance instructions and compliments as if he's their choreographer. His confidence and ridiculous energy make the scene unforgettable. What makes it even funnier is how Carter interacts with the dancers-they're confused but go along with his antics, and his over-the-top behavior just keeps escalating. That satisfying release when someone finally works out a knot… 😮‍💨🙌 But what's actually happening inside your muscle when that happens? A muscle "knot" — technically called a myofascial trigger point — is a tight, contracted band of muscle fibers that won't relax on their own. Blood flow gets restricted, waste products build up, and the surrounding nerves get irritated. That's why knots don't just hurt where they are — they refer pain to other areas too. Here's what massage actually does: → Increases blood flow to the restricted area → Breaks up adhesions between muscle fibers → Flushes out built-up metabolic waste → Activates the nervous system to signal the muscle to finally let go → Reduces inflammation in the surrounding tissue That "melting" feeling you get when pressure is applied to the right spot? That's your nervous system releasing the contraction it's been holding — sometimes for weeks or months. Knots don't form overnight. And they don't disappear overnight either. But consistent targeted treatment — massage, dry needling, stretching, and proper movement — gets there. 🙌 Your muscles are trying to protect you. Kintsugi (Jinshan repair) is an elegant traditional oriental restoration craft rooted in the philosophy of embracing imperfection, widely used to mend broken porcelain teacups and ceramic wares. It relies purely on natural raw lacquer and crushed porcelain powder to fill fractures, then decorates joints with fine gold powder. Every repair step demands lengthy natural shade drying and repeated meticulous polishing with equisetum and carbon tools. Instead of hiding cracks completely, golden lines highlight traces of breakage, turning damage into unique ornamental texture. This craft embodies the aesthetic idea that scars and flaws carry special beauty and stories. Beyond simple mending, gold lacquer repair interprets the wisdom of cherishing old objects and tolerating imperfection. It inherits ancient Chinese raw lacquer craftsmanship and oriental Zen aesthetics, endowing broken teacups with renewed vitality, sentimental value and timeless artistic charm. #handwork #ancientchina #handmade #countrylife #craft #crafttok #intangibleculturalheritage

Tim perahu naga (dragon boat) mempersembahkan sebanyak lima medali emas dan perak untuk Indonesia pada ajang The World Games (TWG) Chengdu 2025. Berdasarkan laporan hasil pertandingan, Indonesia berhasil merebut tiga medali emas dari nomor open 8-seater 2000m, open 8-seater 200m, nomor 10 seater-500m dan dua perak dari nomor open 8-seater 500m dan 10-seater 2000m pursuit race. Dalam kejuaraan dunia multi cabang olahraga itu, Indonesia juga mengirim perwakilan cari cabang lain untuk bersaing di duathlon, karate, kickboxing, panjat tebing, dengan total atlet sebanyak 28 orang. ​​​​​​ Saat ini, Indonesia menghuni peringkat ketujuh klasemen sementara perolehan medali TWG Chengdu 2025 di bawah Prancis (3 emas, 4 perak, 3 perunggu), Swiss (4-2), China (4-2), Ukraina (4-3-1), Italia (6-8-8), dan Jerman (9-6-4).  #TheWorldGames #TWG2025 #Chengdu #PerahuNaga #DragonBoat #Indonesia #China #tiktokberita #fyp #longervideos

Zurya, Goddess of water is responsible for different realities on different planets, she as a benevolent deity allowed a father who had been corrupted and transformed into a deformed monster, to be able to see his family for 10 years in his body restored by the energy of the Goddess herself. For him to see his son grow up, and after that he would fulfill his promise to the Goddess to go to the next incarnation by erasing his memory without resistance. The Goddess fulfilled her part of the promise, however mortals when offered a hand, they want an arm, and that was the last straw of the Goddess's patience. (The reason the Goddess helped the mortal was because his corruption was caused by him trying all his life to lift his family out of poverty, to have a table full of food. But greed dominated the poor father, and he made a contract with a black magician, trading his soul, and he was deceived and the anger of betrayal corrupted his body. The Goddess recovered his soul, and his love for his family was greater than his hatred, so that was how he made this last request. . Para ele ver seu filho crescer, e depois disso ele iria cumprir sua promessa com a Deusa de ir para a próxima encarnação apagando sua memória sem resistências.  A Deusa cumpriu sua parte, no entanto mortais quando oferecido uma mão, depois querem um braço, e essa foi a última gota de paciência da Deusa. (O motivo da Deusa ter ajudado, foi porque a corrupção foi causada por ele ter tentado a vida inteira tirar sua família da pobreza. Mas a ganância dominou o pobre pai, e ele fez um contrato, negociando sua alma, e foi enganado e a raiva da traição corrompeu o pai. A Deusa recuperou sua alma, e seu amor pela sua família era maior que o seu ódio, então foi assim que ele fez esse último pedido.
